posts.title: Introducing Alchemix v3
posts.summary: Unveils the next generation protocol featuring 90% LTV vaults, Fixed-Yield Opportunities, Mix-Yield Token, and a New Era of Capital Efficiency with enhanced self-repaying loan mechanics and improved capital management.

posts.title: Alchemix Q4 2025 Report Summary
posts.summary: Quarterly financial overview showing treasury decline to $10.64M and global deposits at $44.52M, highlighting v3 testnet progress and security achievements including Immunefi audit competition.

posts.title: Introducing Mana: Alchemix v3 Migration Incentives
posts.summary: Describes the Mana rewards system offering retroactive rewards for activity dating back to January 15th, 2025, with 10,000 rALCX distributed to ecosystem participants.

posts.title: The Great Alchemix v3 Migration
posts.summary: Details comprehensive migration plan from v2 to v3, explaining the one-week transition process and compensating users for their trust through the Migration Mana Program.

posts.title: Alchemix Q3 2025 Report Summary
posts.summary: Reports significant growth with treasury increasing 33.4% to $16.56M and global deposits reaching $63.52M, alongside successful Cantina security review completion.

posts.title: Alchemix Q2 2025 Report Summary
posts.summary: Quarterly update highlighting 100,000 OP grant from Optimism and multiple security initiatives including SEAL Safe Harbor adoption and Immunefi Magnus protection.

posts.title: Alchemix Q1 2025 Report Summary
posts.summary: Q1 performance amid market downturn showing treasury decline to $12.32M despite generating $950K revenue and launching Wormhole cross-chain integration.
